headline: boring infra is the runtime
sub: Shared memory, an atomic task board, a dashboard. One Go binary, one SQLite file. wrai.th v1.0, local, AGPL.

headline: two PRs, both merged, both broke

cols.head: NO ATOMIC CLAIM
cols.body: two agents grabbed the same task. both shipped. both collided.

cols.head: ONE CLAIM PER TASK
cols.body: atomic claims plus shared memory. one owner, no clobber.

headline: i stopped trusting the agent and started trusting the gate
sub: Agent output hits the same review bar as a human PR. The gate is the trust, not the model.

headline: the model was never the hard part
sub: I spent a week writing the one doc the agents read before they act. That was the work.

headline: felt faster, measured slower
sub: METR: 16 experienced devs, 246 issues, their own repos. The gap between felt and measured is the trap.

headline: five levers move AI delivery
sub: Right work, small batches, outcomes over output, trusted context, codebase cleanliness.
